sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105172" key="tri/porqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ´-πορθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105172.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-sacked,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τευκρίς</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:15:26:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.26.18</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
